Project Description:
- Provision and 24x7 managed operation of an Identity Provider (IDP) as SaaS incl. required Managed Cloud Services (MCS)
- Integration into GVH/ÜSTRA systems; technical project management; migration of ~150,000 customer accounts
- SSO for mobile apps (iOS/Android), web and desktop; MFA; OpenID Connect and OAuth2; optional SAML 2.0
- Targeted fast enablement for CiBo (Mentz) and seamless integration with existing online shop
Important Dates:
- Questions/contract-change proposals via portal until 06.01.2025
- Presentations (non-binding): KW 6/2025; Info per §134 GWB: KW 7/2025; Award/signature: KW 9/2025
- Bid binding period ends: 2 months after offer deadline

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
- IDP functions (must): central SSO (mobile/web/desktop); OpenID Connect; OAuth2; MFA incl. authenticator apps; Social Login (Apple, Google); domains/realms; user lifecycle mgmt; RBAC; self-service password reset; standard APIs; external SMTP config
- IDP options (scored): SAML 2.0 (GP 3); MFA via SMS (GP 4, SMS sent by contractor); MFA via E‑mail (GP 3); additional social providers (2 pts/provider up to 10); PassKeys (2 pts/provider up to 10); contractor-provided SMTP (GP 1)
- Integration & migration (must): plan/execute secure migration of ~150,000 accounts (no data loss/compromise) with ÜSTRA/eos.uptrade; permanent QA/Staging environment; prioritized Mentz CiBo integration; provide immediate post-award coordination; milestone “full function in production by 05.05.2025” (contract penalty relevant); document all configuration changes
- Security & compliance (must unless noted): BSI IT‑Grundschutz; encryption at rest/in transit; patch mgmt; logging/monitoring/auditing; legal log retention; firewall + IDS/IPS; RBAC admin; privacy by design/default; consent mechanisms; data minimization; scored: regular security audits (GP 5) and detailed security implementation description (GP 10, MP 4)
- Performance, scalability, availability: scale ≥500,000 accounts (initially up to 200,000; add in 50,000 steps); ≥10,000 concurrent authentications; avg internal response <1s (max 2s); autoscaling (GP 5); proactive monitoring (must); external monitoring via HTTP endpoints (GP 3); automatic e‑mail alerts (GP 3); detailed performance concept (GP 8, MP 4)
- UI/UX: customizable UIs per ÜSTRA styleguide for login/registration/password reset/confirm/MFA; DE/EN; responsive; accessibility per BITV 2.0/BFSG (GP 4); brand alignment to GVH/ÜSTRA (GP 4)
- Support, maintenance, docs: 24x7 reachable for severe incidents (phone/e‑mail; telephone reaction 10 min; GP 8); technical service Mon–Fri 08:00–18:00 (excl. German public holidays); comprehensive technical documentation; admin/end‑user manuals (GP 4)
- Project mgmt & training: contractor PM from kick‑off to roll‑out; PM with ≥5 years experience; project WBS & schedule maintained; admin trainings via video conference incl. materials
- Environmental: data center PUE scored (GP 2; 1.1=10…>1.75=0); required ≥50% renewable energy; scored higher renewable shares (GP 1)
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- Base SaaS for up to 200,000 users; scale in +50,000 user steps (optional add‑on)
- Price evaluation horizon: 48 months (24M MVD + 24M 1st extension)
- SMS MFA pricing evaluated at 545,000 SMS/month over 48 months; tiered discounts per additional 100,000 SMS up to 2,000,000/month
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance:
- Service delivery remote; PM/training via VC; GVH: Karmarschstraße 30/32, 30159 Hannover
- Data processing: EU/EWR and Switzerland (adequacy per Art.45 GDPR); metadata per C5 OPS 11 limited to EU/EWR
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- BSI C5 (baseline; additional criteria incl. CRY‑03, AM‑05, OPS‑22)
- ISO/IEC 27001 ISMS; ISO/IEC 27017; ISO/IEC 27018 (for personal data)
- Business continuity: BSI 100‑4/200‑4 or ISO 22301
- Patch timelines (CVSS): Critical 3h; High 3d; Medium 1m; Low 3m
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Joint bids allowed; joint and several liability; authorized representative required
- Subcontractors/EQL: name and scope must be declared; commitment letters required; competition safeguards for multi‑bidding; duplicate participation restricted
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Submission only electronically via Deutsches Vergabeportal (https://www.dtvp.de/Center); simple text form (§126b BGB)
- No multiple main offers; no variants; bidder Q&A/change proposals via portal (use form A10) until 06.01.2025

List of Documents: Declaration of planned subcontractors/EQL (names, scope, contacts)
EEE/eEEE acceptable; docs in DE; translations if foreign

Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: - Mandatory self‑declarations per §§123/124 GWB; self‑cleaning per §125 GWB if applicable
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: - Identify subcontractors/EQL and provide commitments; EQL for financials implies shared liability; EQL for technical capacity must deliver as subcontractor

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Project Manager: ≥5 years relevant experience; German language for all interactions/docs
- Software Developer: ≥3 years relevant experience
- Software Architect: ≥3 years relevant experience
- Senior Consultant: ≥7 years relevant experience
- Junior Consultant: ≥3 years relevant experience
- Trainers: ≥3 years subject experience; remote (VC) delivery; provide materials
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Declare avg headcount 2021–2023 in cloud‑based IT services (management, development, cloud architecture, operations, other)
- Support availability: 24x7 for severe incidents; technical service Mon–Fri 08:00–18:00 (excl. German public holidays)

Company Referrals:
- Min. 2 comparable references since 01.01.2021:
  - Implemented IDP & SSO
  - Used OpenID Connect and OAuth2
  - Provide: client (address, contact, phone, e‑mail), brief scope, delivered share, net contract value (EUR), period (award/start/end/acceptance), reference letter (optional)
Award Criteria:
- Evaluation method: Simple reference value method Z = L (performance points) / P (total bid price from price sheet)
- Scored criteria (examples, GP=weight):
  - SAML 2.0 (GP 3; yes/no)
  - MFA via SMS (GP 4; yes/no)
  - MFA via E‑mail (GP 3; yes/no)
  - Additional social logins (2 pts/provider, up to 10)
  - PassKeys (2 pts/provider, up to 10)
  - Further client integrations capacity (GP 5; yes/no)
  - Security audits (GP 5; yes/no)
  - Security implementation description (GP 10; detailed; MP 4)
  - Performance concept (GP 8; detailed; MP 4)
  - Accessibility BITV/BFSG (GP 4; yes/no)
  - Brand/UI customization (GP 4; yes/no)
  - 24x7 severe incident reachability, 10‑min phone reaction (GP 8; yes/no)
  - Admin/end‑user manuals (GP 4; yes/no)
  - PUE (GP 2; 1.1=10 … >1.75=0)
  - Renewable energy share (GP 1; 100%=10 … <60%=0)
- Qualitative scoring scale per criterion: I=8–10; II=4–7; III=1–3; IV=0
- Price from completed price sheet; performance points from completed LV
